data.title: Crypto lobbyists celebrate India’s Independence Day with Bitcoin policy think tank
data.description:
The Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI), a think tank focused on the flagship cryptocurrency, has launched in India. The policy group is the first in the country and was launched on India’s Independence Day. According to its post on X, the institute’s mission is to provide the research and education needed to make India a financially […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-first-bitcoin-policy-think-tank/
